title: senecio napifolius
intro: Senecio napifolius, also known as the globe artichoke thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio napifolius include its ability to protect the liver, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal remedies to support liver health and reduce oxidative stress.
